reviews.review_description: Really enjoying this app. anyone who likes traditional japan culture should get this app.. But there are  Two things that  need to be put into the app , it needs floor adjustment option , and although i like the cat, we need the option to not have the cat , it can knock over the items your using and can get n the way.  other than that its amazing.

developer_response.body: Thank you for enjoying it! I will consider how to implement the two pieces of feedback!

reviews.review_description:
Japan Activity Simulator is a calm, culture-focused VR experience that lets you explore stylized versions of Japan and try out traditional activities. Instead of being a “game” in the usual sense, it leans heavily into relaxation, immersion, and light interaction.

The game places you in beautifully recreated Japanese settings—such as gardens, tea rooms, and dojos—where you can freely explore and interact with objects.

You can participate in a tea ceremony or handling and maintaining a katana.

It’s essentially a virtual trip to Japan—great if you’re curious about the culture but want something interactive rather than educational.

There is  very limited gameplay depth and interactions are repetitive.

I recommended this game for people who enjoy relaxing, meditative VR experiences and for fans of Japanese culture or travel.

I don’t  recommended the game for gamers looking for depth, progression, or challenge. It isn’t a action-oriented game (no combat, fast gameplay or competition)! For people who get bored quickly without clear goals or reward, or for anyone who’s expecting a “full game” rather than a sandbox-style experience!

Please add good hand tracking.

Thx

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your review. Regarding your request for add good hand tracking, we would appreciate it if you could send us the details via our website.
Thank you.
